# Multi-Directive Charter Fixture

> Used by FR-034 contract tests.

## Mission

Exercise the compact/bootstrap parity contract for multiple directive
and tactic IDs.

## Directives

- DIRECTIVE_003: Locality of change.
- DIRECTIVE_007: Atomic writes.
- DIRECTIVE_011: Fail loud on uninitialized repo.

## Tactics

- TAC-010: Resolve canonical root before write.
- TAC-011: Never silently fall back.
- TAC-012: Hide deprecated aliases from --help.

## Reference Section

Just a heading-bearing section with no IDs to keep parity honest.
